characterPresencePlanEn: the protagonist should be clearly readable in the frame through face, posture, or fuller-body action while the lived event stays primary
framingZh: 构图跟着这个瞬间走，让同一个瞬间里的动作和现场先成立。
framingEn: moment-led framing rooted in the same lived action
mustShowZh: 纸巾上晕开的淡蓝色水痕
走廊窗边昏暗的天光映在侧脸上
mustShowEn: the faint blue water stain spreading on the tissue
the dim daylight from the corridor window falling on the side of the face
mayShowEn: the edge of the schoolbag's side pocket
the corridor wall or window frame
the tips of her hair or the small red hairclip
mustAvoidZh: 没有角色痕迹的空旷风景
atmosphereZh: 像顺手留下的一段真实生活
altTextZh: Tsukimi Rion 在走廊窗边发现纸巾上被雨水洇开的蓝色痕迹。
